properties.body:
WESTERN SOUTH ATLANTIC.
URUGUAY.
1. SEISMIC SURVEY IN PROGRESS UNTIL 13 DEC 
   BY M/V TASMAN TOWING 12 8800 METER LONG CABLES 
   ALONG TRACKLINES BETWEEN:
   A. 36-33.95S 051-43.77W AND 35-50.38S 052-26.41W.
   B. 35-57.48S 052-30.10W AND 36-41.07S 051-47.53W.
   NINE MILE BERTH REQUESTED.
2. CANCEL THIS MSG 14 DEC 12.
